author: @bethwilton8075
text: Yes people can be AWESOME ❤ I was watching this video when an AWESOME person called to check on us, someone who is a reason we're not freezin'❤ There's a whole lotta love in the world! Keep spreading it, thanks to everyone who does! ❤ This is a great channel with a wonderful community of subscribers. You bless us all with what you do, thanks! And thank you fellow subscribers who are able to support this channel in any way. Love to you!❤

author: @totherarf
text:
That was nice!
Seriously Rob, when you look at your output, even when you are talking about people who are "not on the same page of goodness" you do not denigrate them! 
Your whole output is almost universally  ...... Good!
I don't mean the content is great and interesting (even though it is) but that you are attempting to spread goodness around for us all to dip in the well. Thank you for that!

I think there is a special place for what has just happened. RAK ...... Random Acts of Kindness inspire us all to do that little bit more. It does not have to be a physical act, like giving someone money, or a gift freely given where you perceive the need, it can be informational. There was a guy somewhere who said "It is better to give than receive" ..... I think he has a point!
RAK can cause a ripple of goodness to pass round nearby but unforeseen places too. 
If anyone reading this can, just look around you and see if someone is struggling a bit .... and offer them help in whichever way suits you and your circumstance. Even just offering a hand say to someone struggling to change a wheel or even just simply smiling and saying "Hello" to people you meet counts!
OK, I'll shut up now ;o)
